## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Configuration / DevOps

## Services Affected

- [ ] Backend (NestJS)
- [ ] Admin UI (Dashboard)
- [ ] Client UI (Widget)
- [ ] SDK (loyalty.js)
- [ ] Shared (@pionts/shared)
- [ ] Database (schema/migrations)
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Docker / Infrastructure

## Testing

- [ ] Backend unit tests pass (`cd backend && npm test`)
- [ ] Backend E2E tests pass (`cd backend && npm run test:e2e`)
- [ ] Frontend tests pass (vitest)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors
- [ ] Manually tested the changes
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality

## Code Quality

- [ ] All DB queries scoped by projectId
- [ ] No secrets in code or logs
- [ ] Input validated with DTOs
- [ ] Guards applied to new endpoints
- [ ] Follows existing code patterns and conventions
